overall.description: First-person game footage depicting a nighttime walk through rural countryside. The scene begins on a dirt path under a clear dark sky, transitions into a grassy field as rain begins to fall, and concludes with crossing a shallow stream. The environment is open and natural with no buildings or other people visible.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a dirt path through dark fields at night

entered.detail: unpaved dirt road stretching forward into the darkness
tall grass lining both sides of the path
wooden fence posts running parallel to the path
dark silhouette of trees on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person view walking along a dirt path through open countryside at night. The path is flanked by grass and occasional fence posts, with a dark tree line visible on the horizon under a clear night sky.

events.description: rain begins to fall, visible as vertical streaks against the dark sky
turns left off the dirt path and enters the tall grass field

agents.ego_description: proceeds through tall grass after turning off the path, continuing forward as rain falls

entered.detail: dense tall grass now surrounding the camera at waist height
visible rain falling against the dark sky

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left off the path into a field of tall grass as rain begins to fall. The environment becomes wetter and the vegetation denser, with rain streaks visible against the night sky as the camera moves through the open field.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow stream crossing in open field

events.description: crosses a shallow stream or water-filled ditch in the field

agents.ego_description: wades through a shallow stream and continues onto the opposite bank

entered.detail: shallow water crossing reflecting the dim light
continuation of the path visible on the far side of the water

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the camera approaching and crossing a shallow stream or water-filled area in the field. After wading through the water, the camera continues forward onto the opposite bank where the dirt path resumes, still under the falling rain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a dark rural landscape that transforms from a dry nighttime walk into a rainy trek across a waterway. It begins by moving along a dirt path flanked by grass and fence posts under a clear night sky with a distant tree line on the horizon. As the camera turns left off the path, the environment shifts into a field of tall, dense grass while rain begins to fall in visible streaks against the darkness. The scene then progresses through the wetter terrain toward a shallow stream, wading through the water before finally emerging onto the opposite bank where the dirt path resumes under the steady rain.
